SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ApplicationData
ApplicationData represents the data structure used for storing application-related information.
BaseController
BaseController serves as a gateway for interacting with the ML component.
DreamteamApplication
The main class for the Dreamteam application.
EntityNotFoundException
EntityNotFoundException is thrown when a requested entity is not found in the database or collection.
HealthController
HealthController is responsible for providing health check endpoints for the service.
MongoClientConfig
The configuration class for MongoDB client settings.
Project
Project represents the data structure used for storing project-related information.
ProjectController
ProjectController is responsible for handling HTTP requests related to projects.
ProjectRepository
The repository interface for managing Project entities in the MongoDB database.
ProjectService
The service interface for managing Project entities.
ProjectServiceImpl
The service implementation for managing Project entities.
Student
Student represents the data structure used for storing student-related information.
StudentController
StudentController is responsible for handling HTTP requests related to students.
StudentRepository
The repository interface for managing Student entities in the MongoDB database.
StudentService
The service interface for managing Student entities.
StudentServiceImpl
* The service implementation for managing Student entities.
